channel.title: 渲染 on Chaldea
channel.description: Recent content in 渲染 on Chaldea

item.title: UE4源码笔记：Rendering
item.description: 对于UE的渲染模块，官方文档中是这样说的： There is a lot of rendering code in Unreal Engine 4 (UE4) so it is hard to get a quick high level view of what is going on. A good place to start reading through the code is FDeferredShadingSceneRenderer::Render 那就从FDeferr
